title: Part 8 – Entraînement 2 : finance & transport
instructions: Lisez les deux documents de chaque exercice et répondez aux questions.

passages.label: Bon de commande
passages.text:
PURCHASE ORDER
PO Number: PO-20241107
Date: November 7th
From: Brightfield Ltd, 12 West Quay, Cork
To: OfficeNow Supplies, 44 Trade Road, Dublin

Items ordered:
— 5 x ergonomic chairs @ €180 each = €900
— 2 x height-adjustable desks @ €320 each = €640
— 10 x monitor stands @ €45 each = €450

Subtotal: €1,990
VAT (23%): €457.70
Total: €2,447.70

Delivery requested by: November 20th
Payment terms: Net 30

passages.label: E-mail de confirmation fournisseur
passages.text:
From: OfficeNow Supplies
To: Brightfield Ltd
Subject: Order Confirmation — PO-20241107

Dear Brightfield Team,

Thank you for your order. We are pleased to confirm that all items are in stock and will be dispatched on November 14th, with expected delivery by November 18th — within your requested timeframe.

Please note that the monitor stands come in packs of 5, so we will be dispatching 2 packs (10 units) as ordered.

Invoice will be issued upon dispatch. Payment is due within 30 days of invoice date, in line with your stated terms.

Kind regards,
OfficeNow Supplies

questions.prompt: What is the total amount including VAT?
By when did Brightfield request delivery?
When will the order actually be delivered?
How are the monitor stands packaged?
questions.explanation: "the monitor stands come in packs of 5".
"Payment is due within 30 days of invoice date" / "Payment terms: Net 30".

passages.label: Billet de train électronique
passages.text:
ELECTRONIC TICKET — InterRail Express
Booking Reference: IRE-449821

Passenger: Mr. James Calloway
From: Paris Gare du Nord
To: Brussels-Midi
Departure: Friday, September 6th — 08:17
Arrival: Friday, September 6th — 09:47
Class: Business
Seat: Car 3, Seat 22A (window)
Price paid: €114.00

Changes and cancellations: Free of charge up to 24 hours before departure. Changes within 24 hours incur a €25 fee. No refund for cancellations within 2 hours of departure.

passages.label: E-mail d'un collègue
passages.text:
From: Anna Morel
To: James Calloway
Subject: Meeting update — Brussels

Hi James,

Just a heads-up: the client has pushed the meeting back by two hours — it now starts at 12:30 p.m. instead of 10:30 a.m.

Your current train gets in at 9:47 a.m., so you would still arrive well in advance. However, if you prefer to take a later train, there's one at 10:45 a.m. arriving at 12:15 p.m., which would be cutting it quite fine.

Let me know what you decide — I'll book lunch nearby for around 2 p.m.

Anna

questions.prompt: What class is Mr. Calloway's ticket?
What is the fee for changes made within 24 hours of departure?
What change has been made to the meeting?
choices: It has been moved to a different location
It has been pushed back by two hours
It now starts at 10:30 a.m. as planned
questions.explanation: "the client has pushed the meeting back by two hours — it now starts at 12:30 p.m."

questions.prompt: If James takes the 10:45 a.m. train, when does it arrive?
questions.explanation: "there's one at 10:45 a.m. arriving at 12:15 p.m."

questions.prompt: What has Anna planned for around 2 p.m.?
choices: A video call with the Brussels team
questions.explanation: "I'll book lunch nearby for around 2 p.m."

passages.label: Relevé de frais de voyage
passages.text:
TRAVEL EXPENSE CLAIM
Employee: Nadia Osei
Department: Business Development
Trip: Client Visit — Amsterdam
Dates: October 8th–9th

Expenses:
— Return flights (economy): €218
— Hotel (1 night): €145
— Taxi (airport to hotel): €34
— Client dinner (3 guests + Nadia): €187
— Business breakfast: €22

Total claimed: €606

Note: Hotel rate is within policy limit (€160/night). Client dinner pre-approved by Head of BD on October 5th.

passages.label: E-mail du département finance
passages.text:
From: Finance Team
To: Nadia Osei
Subject: Expense Claim — October Trip

Hi Nadia,

We've reviewed your expense claim for the Amsterdam trip and have a couple of queries.

1. The taxi receipt shows €34, but our policy requires a written explanation for taxi fares above €30. Could you add a brief note?

2. The client dinner receipt shows €187 for 4 people. Could you confirm the names and roles of the three clients?

Once we receive this information, we'll process the full claim. In the meantime, we have approved and processed €419 (all items except the taxi and client dinner).

Thanks,
Finance Team

questions.prompt: How many nights did Nadia stay in Amsterdam?

questions.explanation: "Client dinner pre-approved by Head of BD on October 5th".

questions.prompt: Why is the taxi fare being queried?
choices: It was not paid by Nadia
It exceeds €30 and requires a written explanation
Taxis are not covered by company policy
questions.explanation: "our policy requires a written explanation for taxi fares above €30".

questions.prompt: How much has already been approved and processed?
questions.explanation: "we have approved and processed €419 (all items except the taxi and client dinner)".

questions.prompt: How many people attended the client dinner in total?
